MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON FEB-27-2013 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT LISA CASEY'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR ENTRY OGF JUDGMNT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CASEY, LISA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1710 - 25TH STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94107, (SEE SCANNED JUDGMENT GRANTING PLAINTIFF'S EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS)
